reviews.comment:
Como en todas las ypf se destaca la lentitud de los playeros no fui a una ypf que carguen rápido.
Con 2 o 3 autos se marean

(Translated by Google)
As with all YPF stations, the attendants are notoriously slow; I didn't go to one where they pump gas quickly. They get overwhelmed with just two or three cars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEbC1xcHp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
En la playa, 2 personas para atender todos los surtidores, en el bar 1 persona para atender bar, recepción de hotel, entregar toallas y llaves. El concesionario debería repensar su esquema de trabajo, muy poco personal para atender mucho

(Translated by Google)
On the beach, there are two people to staff all the gas pumps, and at the bar, there's only one person to manage the bar, hotel reception, and distribute towels and keys. The concessionaire should rethink their work plan; there are far too few staff to handle so much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5Ny1xWFhnEAE
